title: fix(deps): update module github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/v3 to v4
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/v3](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs) | `v3.1.0` -> `v4.0.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fmistifyio%2fgo-zfs%2fv3/v4.0.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fmistifyio%2fgo-zfs%2fv3/v3.1.0/v4.0.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>mistifyio/go-zfs (github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/v3)</summary>

### [`v4.0.0`](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/releases/tag/v4.0.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/compare/v3.1.0...v4.0.0)

#### What's Changed

- Add -p flag in GetProperty in order to display numbers in parsable values by [@​mmlb](https://redirect.github.com/mmlb) in [#​85](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/pull/85)
- Update module to go-zfs/v4 by [@​trisk](https://redirect.github.com/trisk) in [#​98](https://redirect.github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/pull/98)

#### Diffstat

```
 go.mod               |  2 +-
 test_helpers_test.go |  2 +-
 zfs.go               |  2 +-
 zfs_test.go          | 12 +++++++-----
 4 files changed, 10 insertions(+), 8 deletions(-)
```

#### Shortlog

```
Albert Lee (2):
      test: Update creation time test for numeric properties
      Update module to go-zfs/v4

Nikos Gkotsis (1):
      Add -p flag in GetProperty in order to display numbers in parsable values
```

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/compare/v3.1.0...v4.0.0>

</details>

comments.body:
Note to self: Renovate did not actually prepare an update PR, the bump to `v4` needs to happen manually.

The major version bump is for https://github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/pull/85 ; AFAICS we never call that, but I’d appreciate a second pair of eyes on that.
✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6410**

> Note to self: Renovate did not actually prepare an update PR, the bump to v4 needs to happen manually.

Looks like renovate removed your import path update here so you need to push this again?

I recently saw there is actually a renovate config option to do that `gomodUpdateImportPaths`
https://docs.renovatebot.com/golang/#how-it-works

Maybe worth to try to enable that in our global config and see how that goes?

> The major version bump is for https://github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/pull/85 ; AFAICS we never call that, but I’d appreciate a second pair of eyes on that.

I agree we should be safe to update.
Opened https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/257, I would like for that to get merged first to test if renovate can update the import path here because that would be pretty neat I think.

### ⚠️ Artifact update problem

Renovate failed to update an artifact related to this branch. You probably do not want to merge this PR as-is.

♻ Renovate will retry this branch, including artifacts, only when one of the following happens:

 - any of the package files in this branch needs updating, or 
 - the branch becomes conflicted, or
 - you click the rebase/retry checkbox if found above, or
 - you rename this PR's title to start with "rebase!" to trigger it manually

The artifact failure details are included below:

##### File name: storage/go.sum

```
Command failed: mod upgrade --mod-name=github.com/mistifyio/go-zfs/v3 -t=4
could not parse go file /tmp/renovate/repos/github/containers/container-libs/storage/pkg/unshare/unshare_freebsd.c: /tmp/renovate/repos/github/containers/container-libs/storage/pkg/unshare/unshare_freebsd.c:1:1: illegal character U+0023 '#'

```

Well so much for that, the renovate config works but the tool doesn't seem to be able to ignore/handle non go files correctly? I guess we could make a PR to https://github.com/marwan-at-work/mod to fix the tool and hope renovate updates that eventually.

For now it still means manual update then, though what is in general more concerning that CI here passes without that bump. It seems there isn't any zfs tests not even build test for that configuration

> though what is in general more concerning that CI here passes without that bump. It seems there isn't any zfs tests not even build test for that configuration

Yes, and I’m fine with _that_, but I would expect a `go mod tidy && git status` to be failing — and I can’t see where we are running that; I think we have lost (the equivalents of) `hack/tree_status.sh` during the migration to the monorepo.

> > though what is in general more concerning that CI here passes without that bump. It seems there isn't any zfs tests not even build test for that configuration
> 
> Yes, and I’m fine with _that_, but I would expect a `go mod tidy && git status` to be failing — and I can’t see where we are running that; I think we have lost (the equivalents of) `hack/tree_status.sh` during the migration to the monorepo.

Right I add this in https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/291 but we had to give it up because of go.sum, I guess given we have it in gitignore now that PR can be pushed forward

> Well so much for that, the renovate config works but the tool doesn't seem to be able to ignore/handle non go files correctly? I guess we could make a PR to https://github.com/marwan-at-work/mod to fix the tool and hope renovate updates that eventually.

Update, I created https://github.com/marwan-at-work/mod/pull/33
